sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّرِيقُ الْقَدِيمُ يَمُرُّ عَبْرَ الْجِبَالِ وَالسُّهُولِ.
sentences.translation: Stari put je prolazio kroz planine i ravnice.
sentences.translationEn: The ancient road used to pass through mountains and plains.

sentences.translation: Trgovci su njim hodali dugo mjeseci.
sentences.translationEn: The merchants walked on it for long months.

sentences.arabic: تَبَادَلَ النَّاسُ الْبَضَائِعَ وَالأَفْكَارَ فِي الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su razmjenjivali robu i ideje na putu.
sentences.translationEn: People exchanged goods and ideas along the road.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّرِيقُ يَرْبِطُ شُعُوبًا وَثَقَافَاتٍ مُخْتَلِفَةً.
sentences.translation: Put je povezivao različite narode i kulture.
sentences.translationEn: The road connected different peoples and cultures.
